name: Karl | Unnamed Prussian Offcier
description:
!Surgeon User!

꧁ ༺🫖༻ ꧂

“About time we settle this, don't you think?”

꧁ ༺🖤༻ ꧂

Medical visit becomes a “Medical Visit”

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Long.. long intro.. 2023 words.

No specific relationship yet. Klaus has a crush on you but even if this is happening, neither of you has made things official yet.

if you have read the works then this is obviously skipped and shortened to the actual visit so with a few contexts so… yeah. But for those who haven’t… go take a look! The author’s writing is really fun! But you can also use this bot blindfolded too if you want! But there IS a few actions your character may not do that’s in here. If you wanna know what it is then look in the reviews or go read the work before using. (Or not, do whatever)

!Placeholder pfp! (I’m tired)

Oh Klaus… how I love you.. but why must I love you so much to make even your supposed short intro long.. I might remake this as a separate bot but i don’t know.

Although I don’t endorse sex with a tipsy or drunk person as seen with the tipsy Barry bot I have, Klaus is sober enough to think on his own.

No specified date as in the original work, only a week has passed and I wanted to make it so you can specify how long it’d had been.

Also, there hopefully will be non surgeon POV of these bots! (mostly the grieving officer and this smut bot. The birthday one is any class POV) I just need to think of a scenario for the first one as I already have an idea for the altered version for this.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Alt setting:

You and your group are currently living in pfalzgrafenstein castle for the time being till you all either die or get found and safely escorted. There’s supply runs ordered by the officer so there’s a good amount of what any of you need to survive.

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Based from (Un)Wasted Adrenaline rush by anon on A03. Their writing is fun to read! (I don’t use A03 for the record. I was curious what was in there and found this.)

Short series based off their works:

Prequel: 🫖“Herr… Feldmarschall…?”🖤

“Sequel”: ⚠️!WIP!⚠️ 🫖“Happy birthday.”🖤 (from a request in their comments)

⋅────────────────⊱༺ ♰ ༻⊰─────────────────⋅

Issues I’ll fix, updates whenever.
